summary: Iteration 18 - Event Registration Enhancements testing complete. All backend APIs (11/11) passed. All frontend features verified: Student/Non-Member/International categories show correct address fields + identity proof upload (NO duplicate State in basic fields). Premium hotels display INR+USD prices. Additional person fee shows both INR and USD. Admin Events page has 'Registrations' button for events with registration_enabled. EventRegistrations page fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: EventRegistrationPage.jsx: Basic fields section correctly has only 5 fields (Name, Email, Phone, Qualification, Organization) - NO State field duplicate
Student category: Correctly shows College/Institute, University, Address (Line1, Line2, District, State, Pincode), Bonafide PDF upload, Identity Proof PDF upload
International category: Correctly shows Country, Address Line 1/2, District/City, State/Province, Postal Code, Identity Proof upload + USD info notice
Non-Member category: Correctly shows Address Line 1/2, District, State, Pincode, Identity Proof upload
Premium Hotels: Room types correctly display both INR (₹) and USD ($) prices in fee overview
Additional Person Fee: Correctly shows '₹1500 per person / $50 per person (International)' in fee overview
EventsAdmin.jsx: Hotels tab has room_types with price and price_usd inputs
EventsAdmin.jsx: Accommodation tab has both additional_person_fee (INR) and additional_person_fee_usd inputs
EventsAdmin.jsx: Events with registration_enabled=true show 'Registrations' button linking to /admin/events/{eventId}/registrations
Backend server.py: registration-info API (line 1339-1356) correctly returns venue_map_link and additional_person_fee_usd
seed_data_creation: Test event (IDSEA Annual Conference 2026) already configured with: venue_map_link, additional_person_fee=1500, additional_person_fee_usd=50, premium_hotels with USD prices (The Oberoi: Deluxe 8000/120, Suite 15000/200; Holiday Inn: Standard 4000/60, Deluxe 6000/90)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All event registration enhancement features fully tested. Student/International/Non-Member categories now require address fields + identity proof. No duplicate State field in basic fields. Premium hotel USD prices working. Admin can set INR and USD fees for additional persons. EventRegistrations page fully functional at /admin/events/{eventId}/registrations with view/edit/delete/email/whatsapp/export features.

GET /api/public/events/{id}/registration.premium_hotels with price_usd: PASS - All room types have price_usd

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/events: PASS - Returns events with additional_person_fee_usd and registration_enabled

frontend_registration_step2.member_category: PASS - Shows phone lookup, no extra address fields

student_category.basic_fields: PASS - Name, Email, Phone, Qualification, Organization (NO State)
student_category.address_fields: PASS - Line1, Line2, District, State, Pincode all present

international_category.basic_fields: PASS - Name, Email, Phone, Qualification, Organization (NO State)
international_category.address_fields: PASS - Line1, Line2, District/City, State/Province, Postal Code
international_category.usd_notice: PASS - Shows 'Fees in USD. Payment via Razorpay only.'

non_member_category.basic_fields: PASS - Name, Email, Phone, Qualification, Organization (NO State)
non_member_category.address_fields: PASS - Line1, Line2, District, State, Pincode

frontend_fee_overview.additional_persons_usd: PASS - Shows '₹1500 per person / $50 per person (International)'

admin_events_page.registrations_button: PASS - Shows 'Registrations' button for events with registration_enabled=true

premium_hotels_tab.room_types_usd_input: PASS - Shows 'Room Types (INR + USD for International Delegates)'
premium_hotels_tab.price_and_price_usd_columns: PASS - Two columns for INR and USD prices

event_registrations_page.stats_summary: PASS - Shows Total, Paid, Pending, Revenue, Need Accom, Assigned
event_registrations_page.registration_table: PASS - Shows Name, Phone, Category, Accommodation, Room, Total, Payment, Actions
event_registrations_page.action_buttons: PASS - View, Edit, Delete, Email, WhatsApp icons visible
event_registrations_page.export_buttons: PASS - Excel, PDF, Accommodation, Email All buttons present
